players.name: Google Shopping Scraper API
players.oneLiner: Retrieve product details like names, prices, ranking positions, URLs, sources, and more from Google Shopping in structured JSON format.
players.tagline: Turn Google Shopping data into easy-to-analyze JSON to reduce time to insights.
features: No-code interface to speed up development
Convenient scheduling options
Advanced anti-bot detection bypassing
Near 100% success rate from day one
Structured JSON output of Google Shopping search results
Supports localized data collection with geotargeting
Async scraping for millions of requests
DataPipeline for no-code automation
Multiple output formats including LLM-ready markdown/text
40M proxies across 50+ countries
99.9% uptime guarantee
Unlimited bandwidth
Professional support
players.positioning: Google Shopping Scraper API by ScraperAPI is designed for businesses and developers needing scalable, reliable, and easy-to-use access to Google Shopping product data. It simplifies complex scraping challenges like proxy management, CAPTCHA handling, and dynamic content rendering, enabling users to focus on data analysis and business insights. Suitable for small projects to enterprise-level data collection, it offers both API integration and low-code/no-code tools to fit various technical skill levels and use cases.

players.name: Firecrawl
players.oneLiner: The context API to search, scrape, and interact with the web at scale.
players.tagline: Power AI agents with clean web data
features: Search the web and get full content from results
Scrape clean, structured data from any page including markdown, JSON, screenshots
Interact with web pages using AI prompts or code (click, scroll, type, navigate)
Agent-ready for autonomous data gathering
JavaScript rendering and smart wait for dynamic content
Media parsing including PDFs, DOCX, spreadsheets
Advanced web coverage including JS-heavy pages
Token-efficient output optimized for LLMs
Open source with large community and SDKs for multiple languages
Browser sandbox for secure, managed interactive sessions
Parallel agents for batch processing at scale
Zero configuration, handles proxies, rendering, and complex sites automatically
players.positioning: Firecrawl is positioned as a comprehensive, developer-first infrastructure layer that enables AI systems and developers to reliably search, scrape, and interact with live web data at scale. It is ideal for AI companies and teams building applications that require clean, structured, and up-to-date web data, including deep research agents, RAG pipelines, lead enrichment, competitive intelligence, and AI-powered chatbots. Firecrawl differentiates itself by combining search, scrape, and interact capabilities with high reliability, speed, token efficiency, and open-source transparency, making it a best-in-class solution for powering AI agents and applications with live web context.

players.name: ScrapingBee
players.oneLiner: The Best Web Scraping API to Avoid Getting Blocked
players.tagline: Scrape websites with our powerful web scraping API, without managing proxies, browsers, or anti-bot defenses.
features: Easy to integrate
1,000 free scraper API credits
No credit card required
AI Ready Data with JSON and natural language extraction
Render JavaScript in a real browser with headless Chrome
Automate proxy rotation with premium and stealth proxies
Country-level geolocation
Dedicated scraper APIs for Amazon, Walmart, Google, YouTube, ChatGPT
Integrations with Zapier, n8n, Make
CLI for automated workflows
Screenshots and custom JavaScript scenarios
SOC 2 Type 2 compliant infrastructure
players.positioning: ScrapingBee is positioned as a comprehensive, easy-to-use web scraping API designed for developers, founders, and product teams who need reliable, scalable web data extraction without the complexity of managing proxies, browsers, or anti-bot systems. It targets teams scraping at scale across industries such as AI, e-commerce, market intelligence, fintech, cybersecurity, and go-to-market operations. The platform emphasizes compliance, security, and seamless integration with popular no-code and low-code tools, making it accessible even to non-developers. It competes by offering premium proxy management, JavaScript rendering, AI-powered data extraction, and dedicated APIs for major platforms, all with transparent pricing and strong customer support.

players.name: Apify
players.oneLiner: A platform for large-scale web scraping, automation, and integration with AI agents and workflows.
players.tagline: Learn how to put the web to work.
features: Actors: Develop, run, and share web scraping and automation tools in the cloud.
Storage: Store files and results of web scraping jobs with export options.
Proxy: Smartly rotate datacenter and residential IP addresses to avoid blocking.
Schedules: Automatically start Actors and saved tasks at specific times.
Integrations: Connect Actors with web apps, cloud services, AI agents, and workflow platforms.
Monitoring: Check performance, validate data quality, and receive alerts.
Collaboration: Share Actors, manage organizations and permissions.
Security: SOC 2 Type II compliant platform with strong data protection and vulnerability disclosure policy.
API: REST API with clients for JavaScript and Python.
SDK: Software toolkits for JavaScript and Python to develop Actors.
CLI: Command line interface to control the platform.
Open source tools: Crawlee, Fingerprint Suite, impit, MCP CLI, proxy-chain, and more.
Apify MCP server: Expose Actors as tools to AI clients via Model Context Protocol (MCP).
Actor templates: Ready-made templates for various programming languages and scraping libraries.
Apify Academy: Free practical courses on web scraping and platform usage.
players.positioning: Apify positions itself as a comprehensive, scalable, and secure platform for web scraping and automation, designed for developers and organizations needing high-performance data extraction and integration capabilities. It emphasizes ease of use through Actors, extensive integrations with AI and workflow tools, and strong security and compliance standards. The platform supports both beginners and advanced users with educational resources and open-source tools, aiming to be the central hub for web data automation and AI agent integration.

players.positioning: Oxylabs positions itself as a premium, reliable, and scalable proxy and web scraping platform designed to serve a wide range of use cases including AI training, e-commerce, marketing intelligence, cybersecurity, and custom data workflows. It emphasizes high-quality, ethically sourced IPs, advanced AI-powered tools, and comprehensive support to enable businesses and developers to access public data efficiently and at scale. The platform targets enterprises and professionals needing robust, maintenance-free scraping solutions with flexible pricing and extensive integrations.

players.name: Scrape.do

features: Anti-Bot Bypass
Headless Browser
CAPTCHA Handling
Header and User Agent Rotator
Dynamic TLS Fingerprinting
Asynchronous Web Scraper

Geo-Targeting
players.positioning: Scrape.do positions itself as the ultimate, reliable, and scalable web scraping toolkit designed to overcome modern anti-bot defenses and scaling challenges. It offers unmatched speed, unbeatable prices, and unblocked access with a 99.98% success rate. The platform emphasizes ease of use with single-request APIs, pre-built endpoints for major sites, and expert customer support with rapid response times. Its pay-for-success pricing model and extensive proxy network make it cost-effective and scalable for businesses across various industries including e-commerce, AI, travel, real estate, marketing, social media, finance, cryptocurrency, and job boards.

players.name: Scrapfly
players.oneLiner: Scrape any site, drive any browser, power any agent with one API key and a full-stack web scraping platform.
players.tagline: The ultimate data collection APIs for developers. Scrape, capture, and extract web data with battle-tested tools that scale.
features: Anti-bot bypass on 20+ vendors including Cloudflare, DataDome, Akamai, Kasada, F5
190+ countries with residential and datacenter proxies
AI extraction and JavaScript rendering on every request
Cloud Browser API with stealth Chromium driven over CDP supporting Playwright, Puppeteer, Selenium
Persistent sessions with cookies and auth state across calls
Crawler API for full-site crawls with BFS/DFS depth control and webhook streaming
Data Extraction API with pre-trained models and LLM prompts for structured JSON output
Screenshot API for pixel-perfect full-page or viewport captures with anti-bot bypass
AI Browser Agent for browser automation with AI and tool-call interface
MCP Server to connect any MCP client for scraping, screenshot, extraction, and crawling
Proxy Saver for smart proxy reuse and bandwidth optimization
Unblocker for single endpoint anti-bot bypass with pay on success
Antibot Detector for anti-bot identification with free Chrome extension and REST API
Multiple SDKs including Python, TypeScript, Go, Rust, and Scrapy
No-code platform integrations with Zapier, Make, n8n
LLM & RAG app integrations with LlamaIndex, LangChain, CrewAI
Full stack ownership including in-house proxy mesh, stealth HTTP engine (Curlium), and stealth browser (Scrapium)
Transparent usage-based pricing with free tier and pay only for successful requests
SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, GDPR compliance and certifications
players.positioning: Scrapfly positions itself as a comprehensive, developer-friendly web scraping platform that solves the toughest challenges in web data extraction by owning the entire technology stack. It offers a single API key to access a broad suite of products including scraping, browser automation, screenshots, extraction, crawling, and AI agents. Scrapfly emphasizes high success rates on protected sites, pay-on-success pricing, and seamless integration with popular developer tools and AI frameworks. It targets enterprises and developers needing reliable, scalable, and stealthy web scraping solutions with minimal infrastructure overhead.

players.name: Proxyway
players.oneLiner: Your Trusted Guide to All Things Proxy
players.tagline: Make the right proxy decisions with our honest provider reviews, data-driven research, and in-depth educational content on everything related to proxy servers.
features: Comprehensive proxy provider reviews
Data-driven market research reports
In-depth educational guides on proxies and web scraping
Latest news and updates from the proxy server industry
Comparison and ranking of top web scraping services
Free online proxy checker tool
Coverage of various proxy types including residential, datacenter, ISP/static residential, SOCKS5
Information on proxy use cases and locations
Resources for web scraping including no-code tools, APIs, and scraping browsers
Community engagement via YouTube and Discord
players.positioning: Proxyway positions itself as an authoritative and trusted resource for individuals and businesses seeking to understand, evaluate, and select proxy services and web scraping tools. It targets both technical users and beginners by providing detailed reviews, market research, and educational content. The site emphasizes unbiased, data-driven insights and practical guidance to help users make informed decisions in the proxy and web scraping markets. It also serves as a platform for proxy-related news and industry developments, appealing to enthusiasts, developers, and enterprises needing reliable proxy and scraping solutions.

brief: Mapped 8 players in "web scraping APIs". Most common capabilities: web scraping, api, data extraction. Players: Google Shopping Scraper API, Firecrawl, ScrapingBee, Apify, Oxylabs, Scrape.do, Scrapfly, Proxyway.
